gaps.title: Add TraitBioluminescent for pulsing nature surfaces (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: The enchanted-forest Phase 2 refresh (examples/ai-generation/examples/enchanted-forest.refreshed.holo) demonstrates the need: the forest floor and pond surface should slowly pulse with shifting cyan-green bioluminescent patterns, reactive to player proximity and elapsed time. Only @glowing (static emissive) is available today. The name 'bioluminescent' appears in packages/core/src/traits/constants/nature-life.ts and packages/core/src/traits/visual/composition-rules.ts as a visual composite rule, but no TraitHandler implementation (BioluminescentTrait.ts) exists. Suggested API: @bioluminescent { color: "#00ffcc", pulse_bpm: 12, radius_falloff: 2.5, min_intensity: 0.05, max_intensity: 0.8, pattern: "perlin" } where pattern can be 'perlin' | 'voronoi' | 'solid'. Essential for nature scenes, underwater environments, alien biomes.
